units.source_text: 滙豐控股有限公司 2025年報及賬⽬
units.translation_target_text: HSBC Holdings plc 2025 Annual Report and Accounts
units.translation_en: HSBC Holdings plc 2025 Annual Report and Accounts

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: HSBC Holdings plc 2025 Annual Report and Accounts

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 有關衍⽣⼯具⽤途之詳情，請參閱第169⾴「市場風險」。
units.translation_target_text: For details on the use of derivatives, please see "Market Risk" on page 169.
units.translation_en: For details on the use of derivatives, please see "Market Risk" on page 169.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: For details on the use of derivatives, please see "Market Risk" on page 169.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 滙豐⼤部分衍⽣⼯具交易涉及銷售及交易活動。銷售活動包括為客⼾設計及向客⼾推銷衍⽣⼯具產品，讓客⼾可承擔、轉移、修訂或減低當前或預
units.translation_target_text: Most of HSBC's derivatives transactions involve sales and trading activities. Sales activities include designing and promoting derivatives products to customers, allowing them to assume, transfer, amend or reduce current or expected
units.translation_en: Most of HSBC's derivatives transactions involve sales and trading activities. Sales activities include designing and promoting derivatives products to customers, allowing them to assume, transfer, amend or reduce current or expected

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Most of HSBC's derivatives transactions involve sales and trading activities. Sales activities include designing and promoting derivatives products to customers, allowing them to assume, transfer, amend or reduce current or expected

units.source_text: 期風險。交易活動包括市場莊家及風險管理活動。市場莊家活動涉及向其他市場參與者報價（提供買入價及賣出價），藉差價和交易量賺取收入。
units.translation_target_text: period risk. Trading activities include market making and risk management activities. Market making activities involve quoting prices to other market participants (providing bid and ask prices) and earning income from price differences and trading volume.
units.translation_en: period risk. Trading activities include market making and risk management activities. Market making activities involve quoting prices to other market participants (providing bid and ask prices) and earning income from price differences and trading volume.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: period risk. Trading activities include market making and risk management activities. Market making activities involve quoting prices to other market participants (providing bid and ask prices) and earning income from price differences and trading volume.

units.source_text: 風險管理活動是為了管理客⼾交易引致的風險⽽進⾏，主要⽬的是保持客⼾保證⾦。其他分類為持作交易⽤途之衍⽣⼯具包括不合資格對沖⽤途衍
units.translation_target_text: Risk management activities are carried out to manage the risks arising from customer transactions, with the main purpose of maintaining customer margin. Other derivatives classified as held for trading include derivatives that are not eligible for hedging purposes.
units.translation_en: Risk management activities are carried out to manage the risks arising from customer transactions, with the main purpose of maintaining customer margin. Other derivatives classified as held for trading include derivatives that are not eligible for hedging purposes.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Risk management activities are carried out to manage the risks arising from customer transactions, with the main purpose of maintaining customer margin. Other derivatives classified as held for trading include derivatives that are not eligible for hedging purposes.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 滙豐控股與附屬公司訂立之衍⽣⼯具，絕⼤部分均與⾦融負債⼀併管理。
units.translation_target_text: Most of the derivative instruments entered into by HSBC Holdings and its subsidiaries are managed together with financial liabilities.
units.translation_en: Most of the derivative instruments entered into by HSBC Holdings and its subsidiaries are managed together with financial liabilities.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Most of the derivative instruments entered into by HSBC Holdings and its subsidiaries are managed together with financial liabilities.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 滙豐應⽤對沖會計法管理以下風險：利率及外匯風險。有關該等風險如何產⽣及集團如何管理該等風險的詳情，請參閱「風險回顧」。
units.translation_target_text: HSBC applies hedge accounting to manage the following risks: interest rate and foreign exchange risk. For details on how these risks arise and how the Group manages these risks, please see “Risk Review”.
units.translation_en: HSBC applies hedge accounting to manage the following risks: interest rate and foreign exchange risk. For details on how these risks arise and how the Group manages these risks, please see “Risk Review”.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: HSBC applies hedge accounting to manage the following risks: interest rate and foreign exchange risk. For details on how these risks arise and how the Group manages these risks, please see “Risk Review”.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 滙豐進⾏公允值對沖或現⾦流對沖時，會就⼀個特定利率風險或匯兌風險成分⽽指定⼀個⾦融⼯具或⼀組⾦融⼯具的現⾦流之⼀部分。相關的指定
units.translation_target_text: When HSBC conducts fair value hedging or cash flow hedging, it designates a portion of the cash flows of a financial instrument or a group of financial instruments in relation to a specific interest rate risk or exchange risk component. Relevant designations
units.translation_en: When HSBC conducts fair value hedging or cash flow hedging, it designates a portion of the cash flows of a financial instrument or a group of financial instruments in relation to a specific interest rate risk or exchange risk component. Relevant designations

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: When HSBC conducts fair value hedging or cash flow hedging, it designates a portion of the cash flows of a financial instrument or a group of financial instruments in relation to a specific interest rate risk or exchange risk component. Relevant designations

units.source_text: 風險與部分可按合約條文予以規定，或屬於能以可靠⽅式計量的⾦融⼯具中可予單獨識別的成分。除於利率基準改⾰的第⼆階段過渡中，滙豐指定
units.translation_target_text: Risks and components may be specified in the terms of the contract or may be individually identifiable components of a financial instrument that can be measured reliably. In addition to the second phase of the transition to interest rate benchmark reform, HSBC designated
units.translation_en: Risks and components may be specified in the terms of the contract or may be individually identifiable components of a financial instrument that can be measured reliably. In addition to the second phase of the transition to interest rate benchmark reform, HSBC designated

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Risks and components may be specified in the terms of the contract or may be individually identifiable components of a financial instrument that can be measured reliably. In addition to the second phase of the transition to interest rate benchmark reform, HSBC designated

units.source_text: 以替代基準利率作為初步指定時未予單獨識別的對沖風險之外（條件是滙豐合理預期其可於⾸次指定之⽇起計的24個⽉內達到規定），無風險利率
units.translation_target_text: In addition to using the alternative benchmark rate as a hedging risk that was not separately identified at the time of initial designation (provided that HSBC reasonably expects that it can meet the requirements within 24 months from the date of initial designation), the risk-free rate
units.translation_en: In addition to using the alternative benchmark rate as a hedging risk that was not separately identified at the time of initial designation (provided that HSBC reasonably expects that it can meet the requirements within 24 months from the date of initial designation), the risk-free rate

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: In addition to using the alternative benchmark rate as a hedging risk that was not separately identified at the time of initial designation (provided that HSBC reasonably expects that it can meet the requirements within 24 months from the date of initial designation), the risk-free rate

units.source_text: 或基準利率⼀般視為既可單獨識別，亦以可靠⽅式計量。該等指定風險成分可呈現對沖項⽬的整體公允值或現⾦流變動中的⼤部分。
units.translation_target_text: Or the benchmark interest rate is generally considered to be both individually identifiable and reliably measured. These designated risk components may represent a substantial portion of the changes in the overall fair value or cash flows of the hedged item.
units.translation_en: Or the benchmark interest rate is generally considered to be both individually identifiable and reliably measured. These designated risk components may represent a substantial portion of the changes in the overall fair value or cash flows of the hedged item.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Or the benchmark interest rate is generally considered to be both individually identifiable and reliably measured. These designated risk components may represent a substantial portion of the changes in the overall fair value or cash flows of the hedged item.

units.source_text: 滙豐使⽤投資淨額對沖法，對海外業務（包括其功能貨幣不同於⺟公司的附屬公司及分⾏）投資淨額的結構性匯兌風險進⾏對沖。當進⾏遠期外匯
units.translation_target_text: HSBC uses the net investment hedging method to hedge the structural exchange risk of the net investment in overseas operations (including subsidiaries and branches whose functional currencies are different from those of the parent company). When conducting forward foreign exchange
units.translation_en: HSBC uses the net investment hedging method to hedge the structural exchange risk of the net investment in overseas operations (including subsidiaries and branches whose functional currencies are different from those of the parent company). When conducting forward foreign exchange

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: HSBC uses the net investment hedging method to hedge the structural exchange risk of the net investment in overseas operations (including subsidiaries and branches whose functional currencies are different from those of the parent company). When conducting forward foreign exchange

units.source_text: 合約對沖時，匯兌風險的即期匯率成分就若⼲資產淨額被指定為對沖風險。
units.translation_target_text: When a contract is hedged, the spot exchange rate component of exchange risk is designated as the hedged risk with respect to a certain net asset amount.
units.translation_en: When a contract is hedged, the spot exchange rate component of exchange risk is designated as the hedged risk with respect to a certain net asset amount.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: When a contract is hedged, the spot exchange rate component of exchange risk is designated as the hedged risk with respect to a certain net asset amount.

units.source_text: 低效⽤對沖可能源⾃基準風險，包括但不限於⽤於計算衍⽣⼯具公允值之折現率、使⽤非零公允值⼯具之對沖，以及對沖項⽬與對沖⼯具之間的名
units.translation_target_text: Ineffective hedging may result from basis risks, including, but not limited to, discount rates used to calculate the fair value of derivatives, hedging using non-zero fair value instruments, and name differences between the hedging item and the hedging instrument.
units.translation_en: Ineffective hedging may result from basis risks, including, but not limited to, discount rates used to calculate the fair value of derivatives, hedging using non-zero fair value instruments, and name differences between the hedging item and the hedging instrument.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Ineffective hedging may result from basis risks, including, but not limited to, discount rates used to calculate the fair value of derivatives, hedging using non-zero fair value instruments, and name differences between the hedging item and the hedging instrument.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence
preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 滙豐訂立定息換浮息掉期，以管理並非按公允值計入損益賬之若⼲定息⾦融⼯具（包括持有及已發⾏之債務證券）因市場利率變動導致的公允值變
units.translation_target_text: HSBC enters into fixed-rate floating rate swaps to manage changes in the fair value of certain fixed-rate financial instruments that are not at fair value through profit or loss (including debt securities held and issued) due to changes in market interest rates.
units.translation_en: HSBC enters into fixed-rate floating rate swaps to manage changes in the fair value of certain fixed-rate financial instruments that are not at fair value through profit or loss (including debt securities held and issued) due to changes in market interest rates.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: HSBC enters into fixed-rate floating rate swaps to manage changes in the fair value of certain fixed-rate financial instruments that are not at fair value through profit or loss (including debt securities held and issued) due to changes in market interest rates.

units.source_text: 指定按合資格對沖會計法列賬的衍⽣⼯具之名義合約⾦額顯⽰於結算⽇未平倉交易的⾯值，並不代表所承擔的風險額。
